# Aleksei Shchetinin

I build and lead AI work at Action1, finding where intelligent systems can create real leverage, shaping how they work, and building solutions people can rely on.

- Location: Berlin, Germany
- Current work: AI R&D at Action1
- Previous work: Wrike
